notFound.title: This learning content isn't available
notFound.body: We couldn't find this course or lesson. It may have moved or isn't ready yet.

mockTestComingSoon: The practice mock test is coming soon.
completeComingSoon: The completion summary is coming soon.
noLessons: Lessons for this course are being prepared.
resetProgressConfirm: Reset your progress for this course? This cannot be undone.
progressLocalOnly: Your progress is saved on this device only — it is not synced to an account.
allLessonsComplete: You have completed every lesson in this course.
questionUnavailable: This practice question is not available yet.
mockTestIntro: Answer all the questions, then submit to see how you did. Your answers are not checked until you submit.
practiceMockOnly: This is a practice mock test — not the official Florida exam. Your score is study feedback only and does not guarantee passing.
scorePracticeOnly: This score is practice feedback only — it is not an official result and does not guarantee passing the official exam.
reviewMaterialsComingSoon: Flashcards and vocabulary review are coming soon.
practiceCompleteBody: Nice work — you have finished this practice material. This is practice and study only; it is not an official course or certificate. For your next step you can revisit lessons, try the practice mock test, or reach out if you have questions.
openOfficialSource: opens an official source in a new tab
generalGuidanceOnly: This is general guidance only — not legal advice and not the DMV/FLHSMV. Confirm current requirements with official sources.
noLegalAdvice: This is general information, not legal advice, and does not guarantee any outcome.
